summary: Elegant subtitle component with fade-in and fade-out transitions for Remotion.

artifact.usageMarkdown: Copy `remotion/subtitle-fade/src/SubtitleFade.tsx` into your Remotion project, import `SubtitleFade` and `subtitleFadeDefaultProps`, then register the `SubtitleFade` composition with duration 120, fps 30, width 1920, and height 1080.
artifact.agentPrompt: Add the Subtitle Fade Remotion asset from remotionhub/remotionhub-assets at remotion/subtitle-fade to my project. Preserve the exported SubtitleFadeProps API and register the SubtitleFade composition with the default props.
